# Data Model Checklist: Schedule open-data refresh jobs

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover policies, runs, steps, and summaries.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/022-schedule-refresh-jobs/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Refresh policy entity captures dataset cadence, time window, and dependencies.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Workflow run entity captures run ID, trigger type, status, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Step run entity captures per-dataset status, retry counts, and errors.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 Dataset version records capture promoted versions and provenance.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-005 Workflow summaries capture promoted, skipped, failed datasets with reasons.
